projects.title: Ironclad Verification Pipeline
projects.subtitle: Sovereign Cloud Security & Cryptographic Identity
projects.resume_desc: Engineered a dual-anchor digital notary system utilizing Azure Key Vault HSMs and the Bitcoin blockchain to create immutable, identity-backed cryptographic proofs of intellectual property.
details: Zero-Trust Architecture: Files are hashed locally; only the SHA-256 fingerprint is transmitted.
• Identity Federation: Bound to an Azure FIPS 140-2 Level 3 HSM for undeniable proof of authorship.
• Dual-Anchor Immutability: Parallel anchoring to Google Firestore and the Bitcoin blockchain (OpenTimestamps).
projects.long_description: To address the need for sovereign intellectual property protection, I architected the Ironclad Verification Pipeline. It is a full-stack, enterprise-grade digital notary that bridges volatile digital assets with immutable cryptographic proof. By federating hardware-backed identity (Azure Key Vault) with decentralized timestamps (Bitcoin network), it establishes an irrefutable chain of custody and authorship for architects and developers.

projects.title: Automated Reality Capture Pipeline
projects.subtitle: Serverless 3D Asset Forge
projects.resume_desc: Architected a serverless 3D reconstruction pipeline using Luma AI and Azure Functions to automate the ingestion and stylization of physical-to-digital assets.
details: A fully automated 'Digital Twin' pipeline for community-scale asset generation.
• Event-driven 'Power Grid' architecture eliminates manual processing friction.
• Integrates cloud-native photogrammetry with stylized AI texture passes.
• Optimized for high-fidelity asset synchronization in 3D environments.
projects.long_description: To bring real-world scale and detail into immersive 3D environments, I developed an automated 'Asset Forge' that bridges physical spaces and digital maps. The pipeline leverages Azure serverless compute to trigger reconstruction and stylization workflows instantly upon data ingestion, ensuring that every asset maintains the project's signature aesthetic while scaling efficiently.

projects.title: atxLetsPlay
projects.subtitle: Community Infrastructure & High-Performance Sync
projects.resume_desc: Architected a high-concurrency community platform for Austin-based interactive events, utilizing a proprietary data synchronization engine to minimize latency.
details: High-performance community hub designed for real-time interaction and engagement.
• Optimized for massive concurrent data streams with minimal overhead.
• Implemented sophisticated state management for dynamic event tracking.
projects.long_description: Proudly built as a cornerstone for local interactive engagement, atxLetsPlay leverages advanced synchronization methods to ensure a seamless experience across distributed client nodes. The architecture focuses on resilience and immediate feedback, proving that community-scale tools can match industrial performance standards.

projects.title: Austin Lore Map (3D)
projects.subtitle: Cinematic Surrealist Visualization
projects.resume_desc: Developed a 3D visualization engine for Austin landmarks, integrating narrative 'lore' using the 'Stitching Method' and cinematic 'Horizon Time Jump' transitions.
details: A 3D spatial narrative platform that 'stitches' local history into a surrealist digital cityscape.
• Features a kinetic guide system and light-beam district highlighting.
• Implements a 'Horizon Time Jump' transition for atmospheric storytelling.
projects.long_description: This project explores the intersection of architectural theory and digital storytelling. Using the 'Stitching Method', I've embedded district-specific lore into a high-fidelity 3D environment, allowing users to traverse a version of Austin that is as much a story as it is a map.

projects.title: Azure Internship Sprint (AZ-900)
projects.subtitle: Cloud Infrastructure & Governance
projects.resume_desc: Mastered Azure Cloud Fundamentals (AZ-900) through a rigorous study sprint, implementing secure, scalable infrastructure for automated data processing.
details: Rigorous cloud certification and implementation path focused on enterprise-grade infrastructure.
• Established secure, globally accessible dashboard using Azure Static Web Apps.
• Implemented serverless API architecture using Azure Functions.
• Established secure data ingestion pipelines and IAM best practices.
projects.long_description: Transitioning from local systems to cloud-native architecture required a deep dive into Azure's global infrastructure. This live dashboard tracks my progress through the AZ-900, AI-900, and PL-900 certifications, serving as both a study tool and a production-grade demonstration of Azure deployment.

projects.title: Autonomous Data Intelligence Pipes
projects.subtitle: Event-Driven Automation Philosophy
projects.resume_desc: Architected a serverless, event-driven data ingestion engine using Raspberry Pi 5 listeners and cloud-relay transformation pipes.
details: A 'Pipeline Philosophy' project that eliminates manual data friction using edge-triggered listeners.
• Raspberry Pi 5 listener node for real-time event detection.
• Automated transformation of unstructured web content into standardized Markdown datasets.
projects.long_description: The goal of this project was to formalize the 'Autonomous Pipe' philosophy: data should flow hands-free from source to truth. Using a Raspberry Pi 5 as a local listener, I built a system that captures, transforms, and syncs data across platforms without manual intervention.

projects.title: YMCA Member Management System
projects.subtitle: Rigorous Systems & Community Ops
projects.resume_desc: Architected a custom membership platform for high-volume community operations, balancing administrative precision with real-time check-ins.
details: Custom platform optimized for 'Patience Under Fire' scenarios in high-traffic environments.
• Reduced sync latency for check-ins by 40% via optimistic UI.
• Handled complex program registrations with automated logic.
projects.long_description: Managing community operations at the YMCA required a system that could handle both technical concurrency and the 'energy' of a busy front desk. I focused on building a resilient real-time engine that staff could trust even during peak hours.
